title: Black Steel Spring Clamps, 7.62 cm (Pack of 4) - Heavy-Duty, Durable, Textured Grip, Ideal for DIY & Woodworking
features: SUPERIOR HOLDING POWER: Each clamp in this 4-pack boasts a robust steel spring, offering unparalleled strength and reliability. Hold your workpieces steady like never before

HEAVY-DUTY CONSTRUCTION: Built to last with high-quality nylon and robust steel, these clamps withstand the rigors of your most challenging projects. No more worrying about your clamps breaking or wearing out over time.

ADJUSTABLE CLAMPING FORCE: With a jaw opening of 3 inches (7.62cm), these clamps can accommodate a wide range of materials and thicknesses. Adjust the clamping force with ease, thanks to the ergonomic handle design.

IDEAL FOR A MULTITUDE OF APPLICATIONS: Perfect for woodworking, photography backdrops, securing fabrics, and DIY projects, these clamps combine durability with functionality to help you achieve professional results.
A MUST-HAVE IN EVERY WORKSHOP: Whether you're a professional woodworker or a DIY enthusiast, our black spring clamps are a must-have tool in any workshop.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality pack of spring clamps contain four individual black clamps each constructed from duruable nylon and complete with a sturdy steel clamp. Safety Warning No warning applicable
